'''mohathaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:hideling|hideling]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-h-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:hideling|hideling]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| mohathaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:mohathithi|mohathithi]] || [[word:mohathiji|mohathiji]] || [[word:mohathishi|mohathishi]] || [[word:mohathiki|mohathiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:mohathuthuthu|mohathuthuthu]] || [[word:mohathujuju|mohathujuju]] || [[word:mohathushushu|mohathushushu]] || [[word:mohathukuku|mohathukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:mohathuthu|mohathuthu]] || [[word:mohathuju|mohathuju]] || [[word:mohathushu|mohathushu]] || [[word:mohathuku|mohathuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:mohathufthuf|mohathufthuf]] || [[word:mohathufjuf|mohathufjuf]] || [[word:mohathufshuf|mohathufshuf]] || [[word:mohathufkuf|mohathufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:mohathethe|mohathethe]] || [[word:mohatheje|mohatheje]] || [[word:mohatheshe|mohatheshe]] || [[word:mohatheke|mohatheke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:mohathothotho|mohathothotho]] || [[word:mohathojojo|mohathojojo]] || [[word:mohathoshosho|mohathoshosho]] || [[word:mohathokoko|mohathokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:mohathotho|mohathotho]] || [[word:mohathojo|mohathojo]] || [[word:mohathosho|mohathosho]] || [[word:mohathoko|mohathoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:mohathofthof|mohathofthof]] || [[word:mohathofjof|mohathofjof]] || [[word:mohathofshof|mohathofshof]] || [[word:mohathofkof|mohathofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:mohathĂŻfthĂŻf|mohathĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:mohathĂŻfjĂŻf|mohathĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:mohathĂŻfshĂŻf|mohathĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:mohathĂŻfkĂŻf|mohathĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:mohathĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|mohathĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:mohathĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|mohathĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:mohathĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|mohathĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:mohathĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|mohathĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:mohathĂŻfthĂŻf|mohathĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:mohathĂŻfjĂŻf|mohathĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:mohathĂŻfshĂŻf|mohathĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:mohathĂŻfkĂŻf|mohathĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:mohathĂŻfthĂŻf|mohathĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:mohathĂŻfjĂŻf|mohathĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:mohathĂŻfshĂŻf|mohathĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:mohathĂŻfkĂŻf|mohathĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:mohathĂŠthĂŠ|mohathĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:mohathĂŠjĂŠ|mohathĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:mohathĂŠshĂŠ|mohathĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:mohathĂŠkĂŠ|mohathĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:mohathathatha|mohathathatha]] || [[word:mohathajaja|mohathajaja]] || [[word:mohathashasha|mohathashasha]] || [[word:mohathakaka|mohathakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:mohathatha|mohathatha]] || [[word:mohathaja|mohathaja]] || [[word:mohathasha|mohathasha]] || [[word:mohathaka|mohathaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:mohathafthaf|mohathafthaf]] || [[word:mohathafjaf|mohathafjaf]] || [[word:mohathafshaf|mohathafshaf]] || [[word:mohathafkaf|mohathafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:mohathasha|mohathasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:mohathshĂ«asha|mohathshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:mohathroasha|mohathroasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:mohathmuasha|mohathmuasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:mohathyaasha|mohathyaasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gomohathnkshĂ«asha|gomohathnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gomohathnkroasha|gomohathnkroasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomohathnkmuasha|gomohathnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gomohathnkyaasha|gomohathnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:mohahathasha|mohahathasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:mohahathshĂ«asha|mohahathshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:mohahathroasha|mohahathroasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:mohahathmuasha|mohahathmuasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:mohahathyaasha|mohahathyaasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gomohahathnkshĂ«asha|gomohahathnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gomohahathnkroasha|gomohahathnkroasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomohahathnkmuasha|gomohahathnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gomohahathnkyaasha|gomohahathnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:mehĂŠthasha|mehĂŠthasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:mehĂŠthshĂ«asha|mehĂŠthshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:mehĂŠthroasha|mehĂŠthroasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:mehĂŠthmuasha|mehĂŠthmuasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:mehĂŠthyaasha|mehĂŠthyaasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gomehĂŠthnkshĂ«asha|gomehĂŠthnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gomehĂŠthnkroasha|gomehĂŠthnkroasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomehĂŠthnkmuasha|gomehĂŠthnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gomehĂŠthnkyaasha|gomehĂŠthnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:mohfathasha|mohfathasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:mohfathshĂ«asha|mohfathshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:mohfathroasha|mohfathroasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:mohfathmuasha|mohfathmuasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:mohfathyaasha|mohfathyaasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gomohfathnkshĂ«asha|gomohfathnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gomohfathnkroasha|gomohfathnkroasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomohfathnkmuasha|gomohfathnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gomohfathnkyaasha|gomohfathnkyaasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|17228b0}}
